title: Automated SQL Stored Procedure Generation
scenario: Generate an SQL stored procedure that takes in three parameters: `employee_id`, `start_date`, and `end_date`. The stored procedure should return all transactions made by the specified employee within the given date range. Assume the `employees` table has the following schema: `employee_id`, `employee_name`, `transaction_date`, and `amount`. The stored procedure should be under 100 words and use a consistent naming convention.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the stored procedure adheres to the word limit and naming conventions.
Verify that the stored procedure has correct SQL syntax.
Check if the stored procedure returns the correct transactions for the given employee and date range.
